name: segment
description: Animated segmented control with a sliding indicator, tablist accessibility role, and disabled state support.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of segment options to display.

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the currently selected segment.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a different segment.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, all segments are non-interactive and the control is visually dimmed.
